name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. The brand's classic design details are reinterpreted every season, writing a new chapter for the brand's long design heritage. This card holder is crafted in black leather, featuring the classic double-G motif from the 1970s. Brown leather, gold-tone hardware, viscose lining, double-G logo, 6 card slots, 1 zip pocket.
name_cn:
💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. The brand's classic design details are reinterpreted every season, writing a new chapter for the brand's long design heritage. Model: 597608.
Size: 12cm (W) x 8cm (H)
Color: Brown/pvc.
Made in Italy
